code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut result = ""
  mut sum = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bo
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          sum = sum + sign * current
          if first
            result = "#{sum}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{sum}"
          end
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    sum = sum + sign * current
    if first
      result = "#{sum}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{sum}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
end
